verses.text: Joash in uk ding a kipatin kum sagih pha a, Jerusalem-ah kum sawmli sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Zibiah hi a, Beersheba khuami ahi hi
Siampi Jehoiada' hunsung khempeuh Topa' mitah Joash a manin gamta hi
Jehoiada in ama-a' dingin zi nih laksak a, amah in tapate leh tanute a nei hi
Hih hun khit ciangin Joash in Topa' biakinn a ngei batsak kik ding ngaihsun hi

Amah in siampite leh Levi mite khempeuh khawmin amaute kiangah, “Judah khuapite-ah pai un la, Pasian' biakinn a kum kumin puahna dingin Israel khempeuh tung panin sum khawm un; hih thu na nawh hih ding uh thei un,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin Levi mite kinawhlo uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in amau' ukpi Jehoiada samin ama kiangah, “ Topa' nasem Moses in Topa' ompihna puanbuk-a dingin Israel mihonte tung panin a khon mangmu bang hangin Judah leh Jerusalem panin Levi mite khawmsak lo na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh tua a gilo numei Athaliah leh a pawlte in Pasian' biakinn luh uh a, Topa' biakinn sunga om a ki-ap nate khempeuh zong Baal-te-a' dingin zang uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin kumpipa in thu pia a, amaute in singkuang khat bawlin Topa' biakinn kulhkongpi pualamah a koih uh hi
Gamlakah a omlai-un Pasian' nasem Moses in Israel mite a piaksak mangmu Topa-a' dingin hong puakna dingun Judah leh Jerusalem sung khempeuhah thu zaksakna kibawl hi
Tua ciangin ulian khempeuh leh mi khempeuh lungdamin a mangmu uh hong sung uh a, a man khit mateng uh singkuang sungah khia uh hi

Levi mite in kumpipa' uliante kiangah a singkuang paipih uh a, a sungah sum tampi a omlam a muh peuhpeuh uh ciangin, kumpipa' lai-atpa leh siampi lianpenpa' sawltakpa hong pai-in singkuang sunga sum teng bungkhia-in la uh a, tua ciangin a omna ngei-ah a singkuang koihkik uh hi. Tua bangin a ni ni-in amaute in hih uh a, sum tampi a khawm uh hi

Tua ciangin kumpipa leh Jehoiada in Topa' biakinn nasep a ukte tungah tua sumte pia uh a, amaute in Topa' biakinn a ngei a bangsak kik dingin leilesuang nasep a siamte leh khutsiamte, leh Topa' biakinn a puahkik dingin sik leh sumngo nasep a siamte zong a cial uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua nasepna-ah a kisehte in na semin amau' khutsungah puahkikna nasep in mai nawt a, amaute in a ngei bangin Topa' biakinn bawlkikin kipsak uh hi

Amaute in a zawh khit uh ciangin, kumpipa leh Jehoiada kiangah sum a omlaite hong paipih uh a, amaute in tuate tawh Topa' biakinn-ah nasepna ding leh meihal biakna dingin nazatte, leh paknamtui-a' dingin pakante, leh kham leh ngun beelte a bawl uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Jehoiada' nuntak sung khempeuh a tawntungin Topa' biakinn sungah meihal biaknate a pia uh hi
Ahih hangin Jehoiada teekin a hun kicing ta a, tua ciangin a si hi. A sihin kum za leh kum sawmthum pha hi
Amah in Israel sung, leh Pasian' na leh Pasian' biakinn-ah nasep hoih sem ahih manin amaute in David khuapi sung kumpite' lakah amah a vui uh hi
Jehoiada a sih khit ciangin Judah uliante hong pai-in amau' thu a zuihna dingin kumpipa tungah thu va gen uh a, kumpipa in zong amaute' thu a ngai hi
Tua ahih ciangin amaute in a pu a pate uh Pasian, Topa' biakinn nusia uh a, Asherah milimte leh milim dangte' na sem uh hi. Hih amau' mawhna hangin Judah leh Jerusalem tungah hehna hong tung hi
Ahi zongin Topa' lamah amaute a paipih kik dingin amah in amaute lakah kamsangte a puak hi. Hihte in amau' langkhatah teci pang a, ahih hangin amaute in donlo uh hi

Tua ciangin siampi Jehoiada' tapa Zekhariah' sungah Pasian' kha hong lut hi. Tua ciangin amah dingin mite en sukin mite kiangah, “Pasian in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Bang hangin na mavan' theihlohna dingun Topa' thupiaknate palsat na hi uh hiam? Note in Topa nusia na hih manun amah in note hong nusia hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin amaute in amah sawmsim uh a, kumpipa' thupiakna tawh amaute in Topa' biakinn tualah suang tawh amah denglum uh hi
Tua bangin kumpipa Joash in Zekhariah' pa Jehoiada in ama tungah a lah dikna phawk nawnloin ama tapa thahsak mawk hi. Amah in a sih ding ciangin, “ Topa in mu hen la thuk ta hen!” a ci hi

Kum bei ciangin Joash a simin Syria galkapte hong kuanto hi. Judah leh Jerusalem-ah amaute hong pai-in mite lak panin ulian khempeuh that uh a, a van ngahte khempeuh uh Damaskas kumpipa kiangah puak uh hi

Syria galkapte mi tawmno hong pai hi napi-in, amaute in a pu a pate uh Pasian, Topa nusia uh ahih manin Topa in amaute' khutsungah galkap tampi ahi mite a pia hi. Tua bangin amaute in Joash' tungah thukhenna a pia uh hi

Amah nakpi tak a liamsa-in nusia-in, ama kiang panin Syria mite a kihepkhiat khit uh ciangin, siampi Jehoiada' tapa a thahna hangin a nasemte in amah sawmsim uh a, a lupna tungah amah that uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah si hi. David khuapi sungah amah vui uh a, ahih hangin amaute in kumpite' hanah amah vuilo uh hi
Amah a sawmsim mite pen Ammon numei Shimeath' tapa Zabad, leh Moab numei Shimrith' tapa Jehozabad ahi uh hi
Ama tapate' thute, leh amah a kigensiatna thute, leh Pasian' biakinn a kilamkikna thute, Kumpite' Khang Tangthu Laibu sungah kigelh hi. Tua ciangin a tapa Amaziah in ama tangin a uk hi.
